content: Lithium carbonate prices stabilized around $13,000/tonne in early 2025 after falling from $80,000/tonne peaks in late 2022. China's EV sales grew 35% YoY in 2024 but inventory buildup slowed Q4 purchases. Major producers (Albemarle, SQM, Ganfeng) announced production guidance cuts totaling 15% to support prices. Several junior miners suspended development projects as economics deteriorated below $15,000/tonne.
